title: Wire ScoreCardsGrid into SummaryTab
description: src/components/compare-result/ScoreCardsGrid.tsx was built (tv7.4) and exported but never mounted. Mount it in src/pages/ComparisonDetail.tsx SummaryTab, between WinnerBanner and AIAnalysisBlock per mockup refactor-plan/aisumai-compare-result.html. Feed data from recommendation.score_breakdown (shape {a:{price,location,building}, b:{price,location,building}} — emitted by generate-recommendation per tv7.2). When score_breakdown is null, skip the section entirely (scores only populate after edge fn redeploy).
acceptance_criteria: Section renders with correct A/B bars when score_breakdown present; fully absent (no placeholder) when null.
close_reason: Mounted ScoreCardsGrid in SummaryTab (before AIAnalysisBlock). Added score_breakdown to AIRecommendation type + primary recommendation selects (ai_points-less fallback omits it). Conditional render when score_breakdown is populated.

title: Richer PDF export (enhance tv7.17)
description: tv7.17 ships window.print() + print-only CSS. Works but browser-default layout. If design demands pixel-perfect PDFs: add jspdf + html2canvas (or @react-pdf/renderer), replace handlePrint in src/pages/ComparisonDetail.tsx with a canvas-to-PDF pipeline. Watch bundle size — main bundle already >500KB. Only implement if design signs off that print-CSS is insufficient.

title: analyze-properties: strip scripts/styles/SVG/head from HTML before Gemini
description: analyze-properties/index.ts:272-273 sends raw HTML (~200-500KB per SUUMO page) directly to Gemini unmodified. Stripping <script>, <style>, <svg>, HTML comments, and <head> metadata before the Gemini call typically cuts token count 60-80%, substantially reducing Gemini latency and cost. Must preserve image src/data-src attributes so image extraction still works.
close_reason: Added stripHtmlForGemini helper in analyze-properties/index.ts that removes

title: Backfill extended property + recommendation fields
description: After backend deploy, existing rows still have null values for all new columns. Re-run edge fns to populate. (1) For each existing properties row, re-POST its source_url to analyze-properties to fill the 15 new dedicated columns + amenities jsonb. (2) For each comparisons row with a recommendation, re-invoke generate-recommendation to populate property_a_score_total, property_b_score_total, score_breakdown, ai_points, and row-level winner/badge in summary_table. Consider a one-off admin script under scripts/ to iterate and POST.
acceptance_criteria: Pre-existing rows have non-null values for the new columns; DetailsTab rows show actual data instead of '—'; ScoreCardsGrid and AI points render on historical comparisons.

title: parse-properties: re-evaluate Firecrawl 3s wait + scroll action
description: parse-properties/index.ts:326-329 hardcodes a 3000ms wait plus scroll on every Firecrawl scrape — a flat ~3s floor on the critical path per URL. Test whether SUUMO/athome images are still captured when these actions are removed or reduced. If yes, drop them for a ~3s speedup; if no, document why.

title: analyze-properties: batch property A+B DB inserts into one call
description: analyze-properties/index.ts:872-897 does three serial Supabase round-trips (insert property A, insert property B, insert comparison). Combine A+B into a single .insert([propertyA, propertyB]).select() — saves one round-trip (~100-300ms). Small but free win.

title: parse-properties: try onlyMainContent=true for smaller HTML payload
description: parse-properties/index.ts:330 uses onlyMainContent:false to keep full DOM for image extraction. Investigate whether onlyMainContent:true still surfaces enough image URLs for SUUMO and athome — if yes, the resulting smaller HTML dramatically cuts Gemini input size. Depends on image-extraction coverage test.

title: Deploy tv7 migrations + edge fns to remote Supabase
description: Three migrations and two edge fn changes merged locally but are not live on the remote Supabase project. Until deployed: DetailsTab shows '—' for every new column; SummaryTab skips ai_points/winner/badge pills; ScoreCardsGrid renders nothing; 42703 console warnings fire on every page load. Migrations (apply in order): supabase/migrations/20260421000000_add_score_columns_to_recommendations.sql (tv7.1); 20260421000001_add_purchase_investment_fields.sql (tv7.11); 20260421000002_add_recommendations_ai_points.sql (tv7.8). Edge fns to redeploy: generate-recommendation, analyze-properties.
design: Deploy path: 'supabase db push' against remote project (or Supabase Studio SQL editor); 'supabase functions deploy generate-recommendation' + 'supabase functions deploy analyze-properties'.
acceptance_criteria: Remote DB has new columns; querying recommendations/properties does not 42703; edge fn invocations produce rows with populated new fields.
close_reason: tv7 migrations + edge fns deployed to remote qditnqwrjioypsuxwagg; smoke test passed — score_breakdown/ai_points/per-axis scores populated, no 42703 warnings

title: Sticky-bar verdict: derive from scores, not price
description: Current sticky bar in src/pages/ComparisonDetail.tsx computes winner via a naive price heuristic (search 'const winner'). With tv7.1 + tv7.2 landed, property_a_score_total and property_b_score_total exist on recommendations. Replace the heuristic: use scores when both totals non-null; fall back to price comparison when either is null (so pre-redeploy rows still show a verdict).
design: const winner = recommendation?.property_a_score_total != null && recommendation?.property_b_score_total != null ? (recommendation.property_a_score_total >= recommendation.property_b_score_total ? 'A' : 'B') : /* existing price fallback */;
acceptance_criteria: Sticky bar verdict reads from scores when available; manual QA on a comparison with populated scores shows correct property wins; pre-redeploy rows still render a verdict via price fallback.

title: Remove ProsConsGrid (tv7.20 follow-through)
description: tv7.20 decision was to REMOVE ProsConsGrid once structured AI points (tv7.8/tv7.9) + expert points render in SummaryTab (tv7.10). tv7.10 has now landed, so this cleanup is unblocked. Steps: delete src/components/compare-result/ProsConsGrid.tsx; remove export from src/components/compare-result/index.ts; remove <ProsConsGrid /> usage + any feeder data in src/pages/ComparisonDetail.tsx SummaryTab. Verify: npm run build green; dev server QA the Summary tab — AIAnalysisBlock + ComparisonTable render coherently with no empty gap where ProsConsGrid was.

title: analyze-properties: split Gemini into 2 parallel calls (per property)
description: Currently analyze-properties/index.ts:269-473 concatenates both properties' full HTML into a single Gemini call. Splitting into two parallel calls (one per property) roughly halves Gemini wall-clock time — the dominant cost of the function. Requires updating the prompt to return a single property object instead of {property_a, property_b}, and Promise.all the two calls before merging.

title: Git hygiene: delete QA + worktree branches post-tv7
description: Epic tv7 left behind throwaway branches that can be deleted. QA scratch branches: qa/wave2, qa/wave2b, qa/wave3. Worktree branches + directories: 13 worktree-agent-* under .claude/worktrees/agent-*. Also investigate the prunable /Users/neo/Projects/dowell/home-duo-insight_fix worktree on feat/input_url_refinement — verify with user before pruning (might be unrelated in-flight work). Finally decide fate of root untracked: .beads/ (add to .gitignore or commit the DB) and AGENTS.md (commit or ignore).

title: Merge claude/compare-detail-design-alignment into main
description: Branch is 42+ commits ahead of main, all QA-verified. Merge once cleanup beads are resolved (ProsConsGrid removed, ScoreCardsGrid mounted, 42703 fallback removed post-deploy). Ephemeral branch — local merge only, no push. Command: git checkout main && git merge --no-ff claude/compare-detail-design-alignment.
acceptance_criteria: main tip contains all tv7 epic work; worktree branches gone; remote Supabase in sync with local migrations.

title: Remove 42703 defensive fetch fallback
description: Dev-N added a defensive fallback in src/pages/ComparisonDetail.tsx during wave 2 QA pushback — retries the select with fewer columns on PostgREST error 42703 so the page works before migrations deploy. Once migrations + edge fns are deployed and verified live, the fallback is dead weight. Search for PROPERTY_FIELDS_BASE, PROPERTY_FIELDS_EXTENDED, is42703, and the console.warn lines; collapse to a single extended select; delete retry branches + helper.
acceptance_criteria: No 42703 fallback code remains; comparison pages render with zero console warnings about missing columns.

title: Compare result: design alignment with aisumai-compare-result.html
description: Full gap closure between current /comparisons/:id implementation and the refactor-plan mockup in refactor-plan/aisumai-compare-result.html. Children are independent where possible so agents can work concurrently. Reference files: src/pages/ComparisonDetail.tsx, src/components/compare-result/*.tsx, refactor-plan/aisumai-compare-result.html.

title: Schema: add per-axis AI scores to recommendations
description: Mockup hero shows a 0–100 total score and 3 axis scores (価格 / 立地 / 建物) per property. Current recommendations table has no score columns. Add score fields (shape TBD by implementer: e.g. property_a_score_total + property_a_score_breakdown jsonb, or a normalized scores table). Winner is currently derived naively from price in ComparisonDetail.tsx:235-237; replace with real score.
design: Columns to add (proposal): property_a_score_total smallint, property_b_score_total smallint, score_breakdown jsonb (keys: price, location, building). Emit percentiles 0-100. Consider a migration in supabase/migrations and regenerate types.
acceptance_criteria: Schema migration committed. recommendations row can carry per-property total and axis scores. TypeScript types updated (see types regeneration bead). Existing rows left NULL without breaking detail page.

title: SummaryTab: pass AIPoint[] + model badge into AIAnalysisBlock
description: Once C1 lands, read recommendation.ai_points and pass into AIAnalysisBlock along with the model name (from env or constant).
acceptance_criteria: Rendered Summary tab shows structured colored points under the AI prose; model badge + disclaimer visible.

title: Schema: extend properties with purchase/investment fields
description: Mockup Details tab (refactor-plan/aisumai-compare-result.html lines 682-705) renders 14 rows that don't exist on properties today: 建物構造, 総戸数, 管理形態, 駐車場, 宅配ボックス, コンシェルジュ, ペット可, 外国人購入, 投資・賃貸利用, 想定賃料, 想定表面利回り, 耐震基準, ハザードマップ, 小学校区, 管理費, 修繕積立金, 坪単価, 階数, 向き, 路線.
design: Add nullable columns on properties. Consider grouping rarely-set fields in an amenities jsonb blob to keep the migration narrow. Each field nullable so existing rows are valid. Update supabase/migrations + regenerate types (see types regeneration bead).
acceptance_criteria: Migration committed. New columns queryable. src/integrations/supabase/types.ts updated. DetailsTab schema can reference them.

title: Edge fn analyze-properties: extract extended property fields
description: Update supabase/functions/analyze-properties to pull the fields added in D1 (building structure, total units, management company, parking, concierge, pet policy, seismic standard, etc.) from SUUMO pages via Gemini.
design: Expand Gemini schema. Keep tolerant to missing fields (nulls OK). Document field sources per SUUMO section.
acceptance_criteria: Re-running analyze-properties on test URLs (provided in session memory) populates ≥60% of new fields. Rows with missing fields remain valid.

title: DetailsTab: render full 14-row mockup table
description: Replace the current 8-row DetailsTab in src/pages/ComparisonDetail.tsx with the mockup's canonical 14 rows. Rows with NULL data render '—'. Use ComparisonRow winner+badge where sensible (e.g. 管理費安, ペット可).
design: Row list should mirror refactor-plan/aisumai-compare-result.html lines 690-704. Group highlight/non-highlight alternation already handled by ComparisonTable? If not, add per-row hint.
acceptance_criteria: Details tab shows all 14 rows in the mockup order. Empty fields show '—'. Visual matches mockup.

title: Expert section: unclaimed state parity with mockup
description: Mockup unclaimed state (refactor-plan/aisumai-compare-result.html lines 606-626): dashed-border box, eu-icon, eu-label '不動産専門家の方へ', eu-title, eu-sub, 'このレポートを認領する →' CTA, footer row with view/save stats + area. Verify src/components/compare-result/ExpertSectionPanel.tsx and underlying ExpertSection render this layout; close gaps.
acceptance_criteria: Logged-out expert view visually matches mockup unclaimed block. Accessibility checked.

title: Expert section: claimed state parity with mockup
description: Mockup claimed state (lines 629-680): expert profile header (ec-avatar initial, name, role, badges incl. 認証済み/エリア専門/外国人対応, deals count), verdict block (ec-verdict 19px serif), paragraphs, ec-points (rec-b, caution), contact CTA with 'ログインして相談する →' gated by login.
acceptance_criteria: Displayed expert block includes avatar, role, verified+specialty+language badges, deals count, structured comment points, and login-gated contact CTA. Matches mockup.

title: SimilarProperties: 4-card section below tabs
description: Mockup similar-section (lines 825-837) renders 4 cards of 'similar condition' properties. Not present today. Create src/components/compare-result/SimilarProperties.tsx and query supabase for properties matching prefecture/price band; mount between CompareTabs and ExpertSectionPanel.
design: Query: same prefecture as property_a or property_b, price within ±20%, limit 4, exclude the two compared. If fewer than 4 results, hide section. Grid: 4 cols desktop, 2 cols mobile, using design tokens.
acceptance_criteria: Section appears when ≥4 matches exist. Links to /comparisons or /feed as appropriate. Matches mockup visual.

title: PDF export: 'PDF保存' button for comparison report
description: Mockup topbar has a 'PDF保存' button next to Share. Current implementation has only share. Add PDF export that renders the comparison detail (hero + tabs + AI analysis) to a downloadable PDF.
design: Option 1: client-side html2pdf/print CSS. Option 2: server-side via puppeteer edge fn. Recommend print-CSS first for simplicity; progressive enhancement later.
acceptance_criteria: Clicking 'PDF保存' downloads a PDF with property names, scores, summary table, and AI analysis. Page layout legible in A4 portrait.

title: Sticky bar: translucent paper style + verdict line
description: Current sticky bar (ComparisonDetail.tsx:335-355) is ink-black with paper buttons. Mockup (lines 308-313, 843-857) uses translucent paper (rgba(249,248,245,0.95)+blur), ghost + solid buttons, plus a 'sticky-props' line showing 'A name vs B name — AI推奨: 物件X'.
design: Swap classes to bg-paper/95 backdrop-blur + border-t border-rule. Left: property names + verdict (use recommendation winner when available). Right: '← 新しく比較', 'シェア', '専門家に相談' buttons using .btn-ghost/.btn-solid equivalents.
acceptance_criteria: Sticky bar matches mockup color treatment and contents. Verdict line omitted gracefully when no recommendation.

title: Breadcrumb: align Japanese copy with mockup
description: Current breadcrumb renders English: 'Feed / Compare Report' (ComparisonDetail.tsx:242-246). Mockup uses 'Home / 比較 / <A> vs <B>' (refactor-plan lines 350-357). Update to Japanese labels and include property names in the final segment.
acceptance_criteria: Breadcrumb reads 'Home / 比較 / ${A} vs ${B}' in all supported locales, falling back to English keys if translations missing.

title: Edge fn generate-recommendation: emit AI axis scores
description: Update supabase/functions/generate-recommendation to produce total + per-axis (価格/立地/建物) scores for both properties. Also set the winner (A/B/draw) based on total so the detail page stops using the price heuristic.
design: Gemini prompt update + response parsing. Scores 0-100 integers. Persist into the new columns from the schema bead.
acceptance_criteria: New comparisons get populated scores. Re-running the function on an existing comparison upserts scores. Unit script verifies shape.

title: Decide: keep or remove ProsConsGrid from SummaryTab
description: ProsConsGrid (src/components/compare-result/ProsConsGrid.tsx) renders per-property pros/cons. Mockup has no counterpart — it relies on AI points (Cluster C) + expert points (Cluster E) for that information, which makes ProsConsGrid redundant after those land. Decide: (a) keep pros/cons as extra value beyond mockup, or (b) drop them once C ships. If (b), delete component + export from src/components/compare-result/index.ts and remove from SummaryTab.
acceptance_criteria: Decision recorded in bead notes. If (b), PR removing ProsConsGrid is merged; if (a), brief rationale documented.
notes: Decision: REMOVE ProsConsGrid after tv7.10 lands. Why: once structured AI points (tv7.8/tv7.9) + expert points render in SummaryTab, ProsConsGrid is redundant. How to apply: delete src/components/compare-result/ProsConsGrid.tsx + index export + SummaryTab mount in the PR that wires tv7.10.

title: Topbar: verify parity with mockup (logo, nav, share/PDF)
description: Mockup has a fixed topbar (lines 333-345) with 愛住 AiSumai logo + Beta pill, nav (比較/物件一覧/エリア/About), and action buttons (シェア + PDF保存). Current app shell is not shown in ComparisonDetail.tsx — verify the shared topbar matches these requirements (possibly in src/components layout). File gaps as sub-tasks.
acceptance_criteria: Topbar nav/logo/actions match mockup, or follow-up beads are filed for specific gaps.
notes: Verified src/components/Header.tsx. Matches mockup: 愛住 AiSumai logo + Beta pill (OK), nav 4 items: /compare(比較) /feed(物件一覧) /experts /about(About). Gaps: (a) mockup has エリア instead of /experts — minor, decide in follow-up; (b) mockup has シェア + PDF保存 action buttons which are page-specific (covered by tv7.17 PDF export and tv7.18 sticky bar). No new sub-beads filed; existing beads cover the gaps.

title: Regenerate Supabase types after A1/B2/C1/D1 migrations
description: After each schema-changing bead lands (A1 scores, B2 summary_table shape, C1 ai_points, D1 property fields), run npx supabase gen types typescript to refresh src/integrations/supabase/types.ts. Can be run once at the end or after each merge.
acceptance_criteria: types.ts reflects the new columns; TypeScript build passes; frontend consumers can read the new shapes without 'any'.

title: WinnerBanner: sub-meta, total score, axis bars, reason
description: Current WinnerBanner (src/components/compare-result/WinnerBanner.tsx) shows only label/name/price. Mockup (score-duel) adds: sub-meta line (area · floor · age), large 64px total score, 3 axis bars with numeric labels, winner-side reason paragraph + 'AI 推奨' crown.
design: Props: add scoreTotal?, axisScores?: {price, location, building}, reason?, subMeta?. Reuse .score-duel / .duel-side CSS. Animate bars via existing bar-fill keyframe (tailwind.config.ts). Keep fallback rendering when scores missing.
acceptance_criteria: When scores are present: renders total, 3 animated bars with numeric labels, reason on winner. When absent: current minimal layout. Snapshot matches score-duel block in refactor-plan/aisumai-compare-result.html lines 367-420.

title: ScoreCardsGrid: 3-card A-vs-B overview component
description: Mockup Overview tab has a 3-column score-cards block (価格・コスト / 立地・交通 / 建物・設備), each with 2 paired A/B bars + legend. Not implemented today. Create new src/components/compare-result/ScoreCardsGrid.tsx and mount at the top of SummaryTab.
design: Props: cards: [{ label, metrics: [{ name, aLabel, bLabel, aPct, bPct }] }]. Use existing tokens (text-label-sm, rule, ink/paper). Legend row at bottom of each card. Animate bars via bar-fill keyframe.
acceptance_criteria: Overview tab shows the 3 cards above the comparison table when scoring data is available. Mirrors layout in refactor-plan/aisumai-compare-result.html lines 434-493.

title: ComparisonRow: add winner + badge fields and render
description: Mockup comparison table shows per-row win-badge (安/広/近/多/新/割安/日当り/可/高…) and a 'draw-badge' variant. Current ComparisonTable (src/components/compare-result/ComparisonTable.tsx) has no winner concept. Extend ComparisonRow type with { winner?: 'A'|'B'|'draw', badgeLabel?: string } and render the pill.
design: Add win-badge (ink bg, paper fg, font-mono 8px) on the winning cell per mockup lines 123-125. Draw variant uses paper-dark. Pure FE work; no data dependency on its own.
acceptance_criteria: ComparisonTable renders inline pill on the winner cell when props supplied. Accessible label (sr-only 'winner' text). No regression when fields absent.

title: Edge fn generate-recommendation: emit per-row winner + badge label
description: Extend recommendations.summary_table schema so each row carries winner ('A'|'B'|'draw') and a short badge label (e.g. '安','広','近','多','新'). Today rows are { field, property_a, property_b }.
design: Row shape: { field, property_a, property_b, winner?, badge? }. Prompt the model to choose a 1-3 char badge matching the winner. Keep migration back-compatible — consumer treats fields as optional.
acceptance_criteria: New recommendations return rows with winner/badge. Frontend ComparisonRow consumes them.

title: SummaryTab: wire winner/badge from recommendation.summary_table into ComparisonTable
description: In src/pages/ComparisonDetail.tsx SummaryTab, map recommendation.summary_table[i].winner/badge into ComparisonRow props once B1+B2 land.
acceptance_criteria: When recommendation data includes winner+badge, summary table cells render the win-badge. Verified against a regenerated comparison.

title: Edge fn generate-recommendation: emit structured AI points
description: Mockup AI analysis block has 3 colored points (pro-a / pro-b / warn) with icons (◇ ◆ ⚠). Current recommendations have only final_recommendation (prose) and pros/cons arrays. Emit a typed points[] so AIAnalysisBlock can render them (AIPoint type already defined in src/components/compare-result).
design: Add recommendations.ai_points jsonb: Array<{ kind: 'pro-a'|'pro-b'|'caution', body: string }>. Prompt the model to output 2-4 points. Migration + function update.
acceptance_criteria: New comparisons produce 2-4 structured points; frontend consumes via AIAnalysisBlock.points prop.

title: AIAnalysisBlock: add model badge + disclaimer + structured points rendering
description: Mockup ai-analysis block (refactor-plan/aisumai-compare-result.html lines 564-592) has: dark header with 'AI Analysis' eyebrow + title + model badge ('Claude Sonnet 4'), markdown body, 3 colored points, footer disclaimer. Today AIAnalysisBlock renders only body + optional points. Add headerTitle, headerEyebrow, modelBadge, disclaimer props and ensure .ai-point pro-a/pro-b/warn styling matches.
design: Preserve existing ink-inverted dark header. Points list: icon + bold prefix + body. Disclaimer uses label-mono 9px, ink-30. All new props optional; preserve current call sites.
acceptance_criteria: Block visually matches mockup when given all props. Backward compatible with current usage in SummaryTab.

title: analyze-properties: drop unused getSession() call
description: analyze-properties/index.ts:42-49 calls supabaseClient.auth.getSession() on every invocation to key the rate limiter by user id, but falls back to client IP anyway. Removing it cuts a small per-request latency and one Supabase auth round-trip.

title: Replace hardcoded expert stats in ExpertSectionPanel
description: src/components/compare-result/ExpertSectionPanel.tsx unclaimed block currently hardcodes '284 閲覧 / 12 保存 / <area>' copied from the mockup. Replace with real values: aggregate view/save counts from whichever tables hold them (check comparisons for view_count/save_count fields; file a backend bead if absent). Wire area from properties.address first 3 chars or a prefecture column if/when added.
acceptance_criteria: Unclaimed expert block shows actual counts + area; if data unavailable, placeholder is clearly marked TODO with a filed follow-up bead.

title: Decide topbar エリア nav item (tv7.21 follow-up)
description: Mockup nav: 比較 / 物件一覧 / エリア / About. src/components/Header.tsx has /compare, /feed, /experts, /about — /experts sits where mockup shows エリア. Options: (a) add /areas route + page, move /experts to footer or admin-only; (b) accept divergence and update refactor-plan/ mockup to reflect reality. Pick one, implement, close.
